Seven fill handlers remain planned source-parity work, not audit deferrals. The test review found two regression gaps, both applied in 1a1bda23cf19fa7d3551fa93b858d30cd98c157e. Validation: 55 focused tests, 815 full tests, git diff checks, and the generated themed-room check passed. Fresh seed 710009 Wizard gnome Massacre parity matched all 3192 PRNG calls, full first-prompt screen, and cursor at production commit 604af719; final 1a1bda2 changes tests only.
